title: The Palu Family: Under a Dark Spell
overview: An investigation into one of Turkey's most shocking cases -- and how one man was able to enact total control over a tight-knit family.

title: Legends
overview: As drugs flood the streets of '90s Britain, a team of civil servants is thrust undercover to topple the gangs behind it.

title: M.I.A.
overview: Restless in the Florida Keys, Etta Tiger Jonze dreams of a life in Miami's glittering, sub-tropical kingdom. When her family's drug-running business shatters in tragedy, however, Etta embarks on a dangerous journey through Miami's neon-lit underbelly that will define who she is and what she's ultimately capable of.

title: Love Is Blind: Poland
overview: In this unique dating experiment, Polish singles date, fall in love and get engaged before ever meeting in person. Will their spark survive the reveal?

title: Sofia the First: Magical Friends
overview: Sofia introduces you to her new school and friends!

title: The Godfather of St. Petersburg
overview: In 2025, Vladimir Putin had already been in power for a quarter of a century. But how did his career begin? The documentary The Godfather of St. Petersburg takes viewers back to the 1990s—to a city marked by chaos, violence, and corruption. As deputy mayor, Putin forged close ties with intelligence services, businessmen, and notorious figures from the underworld. Out of these networks emerged the power structure that continues to define Russia today. Based on exclusive documents, eyewitness accounts, and previously unpublished material, the film reconstructs Putin’s rise and the creation of a system in which loyalty reigns supreme and criticism can be dangerous.

title: Archipelago fever
overview: We follow a group of boat-loving Norwegians exploring the Oslofjord, where there’s no shortage of enthusiasts. They set out to discover every bay, headland, and harbor, showing in their own wild and entertaining ways what a Norwegian summer at sea is all about.

title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu | A Special Look
original_title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu | A Special Look
overview: Get ready for "Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu | A Special Look," only in theaters.

title: Born with Luck
overview: Zhang Yi'ang, a veteran detective, is sent to Sanjiangkou to investigate a case but soon finds himself caught in a web of crime and corruption. While pursuing a powerful criminal network, he unexpectedly receives help from a group of bungling thieves, who inadvertently aid his mission to unravel the truth behind a murder.

title: The Oligarch and the Art Dealer
original_title: The Oligarch and the Art Dealer
overview: When the Swiss art dealer Yves Bouvier meets the Russian oligarch Dmitry Rybolovlev, he quickly rises through the ranks. From a role as a discreet adviser, he becomes a global power broker and manager of Rybolovlev’s investments in one of the world’s most closed and enigmatic markets: the part of the art world where the sums are staggering and the value of artworks is something agreed upon by a narrow elite of connoisseurs and ultrarich tycoons.

title: Golden Boys
overview: The cousins devise a plan to create bold, illegal business ventures. Posener goes on to orchestrate what becomes the largest fraud in Swedish financial history, with Jisander by his side.

title: Glory
overview: In a small-town boxing hub, two brothers investigate a shocking murder while navigating a troubled reunion with their father, a renowned coach.

title: Shut Up Evan
overview: Evan Ross Katz unpacks the zeitgeist with celebrity guests and hosts intimate chats with actors, musicians and tastemakers.

title: Travis Japan Summer Vacation!! in the USA
original_title: Travis Japan Summer Vacation!! ―7人のアメリカ旅―
overview: Travis Japan embarks on a summer road trip through the Rocky Mountains in North America. Divided into teams, one hits the road by RV, the other dives into local culture. With new horizons to explore and heartfelt connections to make, this road trip promises to be unlike any other.

title: Man on Fire
overview: Haunted by his past and hunted by his enemies, a Special Forces veteran fights to keep a teenage girl alive on the deadly streets of Rio de Janeiro.

title: Bedre sex
overview: Janne Formoe and Triana Iglesias set out on a daring exploration of sex, encountering candid storytellers and lively experts who illuminate sex, sexuality and sensuality.

title: Inspectors
overview: In Inspectors, we get to follow the inspectors of the Norwegian Food Safety Authority up close for the first time, in a dramatic and unvarnished encounter with a reality that most of us never get to know.  The Norwegian Food Safety Authority is one of Norway's most important, and least known, emergency response agencies. They are responsible for everything that goes in and on our bodies, such as food, drinks, cosmetics and creams – in addition to animal welfare in Norway. They close restaurants, inspect food factories and stop dangerous imports at the border. Sometimes they have to kill animals that are illegally smuggled into the country, and respond when farms are affected by infectious diseases. Through eight episodes, Inspectors shows the people who make the toughest decisions when safety, health and lives are at stake.

title: Prisoner
overview: A young and ambitious prison officer finds herself in the middle of a battle for the criminal underworld as crime lords try to evade justice. But in order to do that, she will have to learn quickly to put her faith in one of the very men she wants to put behind bars.

title: Should I Marry A Murderer?
overview: A fiancée becomes a key witness after staying engaged to a man accused of murder to gather evidence against him in this documentary series.

title: Gold Land
overview: A young woman working as an airport security agent accidentally comes into possession of a smuggling ring’s gold bars. Caught in a chaotic whirlwind of greed and betrayal among various parties vying for the gold, she becomes consumed by the desire to claim it all for herself.

title: Half Man
overview: When Niall's estranged 'brother' Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives.

title: Straight to Hell
overview: As Japan's most famous fortune teller, Kazuko Hosoki ruled TV and bestseller lists, but who was she behind rumors of spiritual scams and underworld ties?

title: If Wishes Could Kill
overview: A mysterious app promises wishes — then starts a countdown to death. As a group of teens becomes entangled, they must break the deadly chain to survive.

title: Stranger Things: Tales from '85
overview: Winter. Hawkins. 1985. Welcome back to a town crawling with secrets, where beloved heroes are facing fresh mysteries... and an all-new breed of strange.

title: Flunked
overview: Eddy, a math genius and small-time crook, avoids jail-time by going undercover as a teacher. His mission: to identify the kid of a major criminal.

title: Hulk Hogan: Real American
overview: Before he was Hulk Hogan, he was Terry Bollea. Uncover the man behind the legend in this unfiltered documentary featuring his very last interview.

title: Santita
overview: Left in a wheelchair after a crash, Santita leaves the love of her life at the altar. Twenty years later, he returns with a request that changes everything.

title: Unchosen
overview: When a young mother from a sheltered cult crosses paths with a mysterious stranger, she embarks on a risky affair that awakens desires and dark secrets.

title: Chernobyl: Inside The Meltdown
overview: The story about the world's worst nuclear disaster, told by those who witnessed it.

title: Ronaldinho: The One and Only
overview: This series follows the life and career of Brazilian soccer star Ronaldinho, tracing his journey from young prodigy to global sports icon.

title: La nena
overview: Months after the events of The Purple Network, the hunt is not over yet. Following Lucas's death, Elena Blanco has disappeared. Only Mariajo knows where she is, but she keeps it a secret, even from the rest of the team. The fight against The Network has taken too much of a toll on her, and in a desperate attempt to get her life back on track, she has left the BAC.

title: Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair
original_title: Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair
overview: After shielding himself and his daughter from his family for over a decade, Malcolm is dragged back into their orbit when Hal and Lois demand his presence at their 40th anniversary party.

title: The Miniature Wife
overview: Lindy and Les, a married writer and scientist, are forced to re-evaluate the power balances in their relationship after a freak accident shrinks Lindy down to 6 inches tall.

title: Big Mistakes
overview: Blackmailed into working for some very dangerous people, two deeply incapable siblings become the most disorganized duo in organized crime.

title: Bandi
overview: Following the death of their mother, their pillar of strength and their anchor, eleven siblings aged 7 to 23 try to stay united in the face of adversity. But for some of them, drug trafficking seems to be the only way to survive. A decision far from being unanimously accepted, and one that severely tests the strength of their family bonds.

title: The Testaments
overview: Growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known. As a new generation of young women grapple with the bleak future that awaits them, they will be forced to search for allies, new and old, to help in their fight for freedom.

title: Trust Me: The False Prophet
overview: Chronicles the rise of Samuel Bateman, the self-proclaimed heir to Warren Jeffs’ Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints (FLDS), through the eyes of one couple who infiltrated his inner circle.

title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
overview: After the Clone Wars, Maul plots to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire.

title: The Audacity
overview: Inside the bubble of Silicon Valley, a data-mining CEO strives to turn insight and influence into profit and power in this darkly comedic look at the warped dreams, outsized egos, and ethical lapses of the self-styled inventors of the future.

title: Kaptaan
overview: SSP Samardeep, a feared encounter specialist, hides a broken past behind his ruthless image. Years ago, in his pursuit of revenge, he abandoned his informant DK’s brothers. Now In Jwalabad, as Munna, Tinnu, and Shaheen battle for a ₹180-crore tender, Samar joins forces with the ruthless Kabir—only to discover he is one of those lost children, forcing him to face his past.

title: Sins of Kujo
overview: From thugs to yakuza, Taiza Kujo wields the law to defend society's worst. Fellow lawyer, Karasuma doubts his ethics but joins him in facing the abyss.

title: Agent from Above
overview: Bound by a deity's pact, Han Chieh fights demons on Earth. When he uncovers an old enemy's plan for a second invasion, he must fight to save humanity.

title: Alkhallat+: The Series
overview: A Saudi anthology series from the creators of the beloved AlKhallat+ universe, now streaming on Netflix. Four standalone stories drop ordinary underdogs — an anxious teen, a clueless security guard, a desperate filmmaker, and a tongue-tied poet — into absurdly chaotic desert situations. Sharp satire, dry humour, and authentic Saudi cultural identity make each episode a wildly entertaining ride.

title: Dear Killer Nannies
original_title: Dear Killer Nannies: Criado por sicarios
overview: Juan Pablo, Pablo Escobar's son, has an atypical childhood and lives surrounded by hitmen who work as his nannies. He idealizes his father, considering him a benefactor, but as he grows up, he learns that his father is, in fact, a criminal.

title: Privileges
overview: Hoping for a last chance at redemption, a young inmate takes a job inside a luxury Parisian hotel rife with ruthless ambition and betrayal.

title: Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen
original_title: Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen
overview: A bride has a feeling that something horrifying will happen at her wedding — and the closer to the altar she gets, the worse it becomes.

title: Detective Hole
overview: When a series of ritualistic murders hits Oslo, a gifted detective must navigate a puzzle of patterns, corruption and his own demons to catch the killer.

title: Lucky Luke
overview: Lucky Luke, the legendary lone cowboy, must team up with Louise, a fearless young woman searching for her missing mother. Together, they face the dangers of the Wild West, ally with old enemies like the Daltons or Billy the Kid - and learn to get along. This quest may reveal a far greater threat and lead Luke back to the origins of his legend.

title: O11CE: New Generation
overview: After six years of success in European soccer, Gabo, Dedé, and Ricky decide to visit IAD, the Academic Sports Institute, which saw them grow up, and surprise them. But they are the ones who get the surprise: the IAD is not as it used to be and the Golden Hawks, the soccer team they were part of, is aimless, unmotivated, and on the verge of being relegates. Now they must restore the IAD’s glory and the pride of being an Hawk: a new chapter begins, full of passion and plenty of soccer!

title: Radioactive Emergency
overview: Physicists and doctors race to contain a massive radiological disaster and save thousands of lives.

title: ONE PIECE BONUS CONTENT
overview: Take a voyage behind the scenes in this showcase of the effects, Easter eggs and jaw-dropping stunts that brought Season 2 to life.

title: The Other Bennet Sister
overview: Mary isn't your typical period drama heroine. She is awkward, anxious, preachy, full of facts, a terrible singer, overlooked by her mother and seemingly destined to an empty dance card for the rest of her life… until Mary takes matters into her own hands.

title: The Madison
overview: The Clyburns uproot their comfortable New York City lives to the wild, untamed beauty of Montana's Madison River Valley on a search for connection.

title: That Night
overview: When a young, naïve single mother gets embroiled in a murder during an island getaway, her sisters rush to help. But they only make things worse.

title: Rooster
overview: On a college campus, an author navigates a complicated relationship with his daughter.

title: Boyfriend on Demand
overview: Seo Mi-rae is worn out by work. Love? It's the last thing on her mind. But a virtual dating service sparks feelings — and maybe a real shot at romance.

title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man Podcast
original_title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man Podcast
overview: Creators, special guests and stars — including Cillian Murphy — unpack the "Peaky Blinders" saga in this official companion podcast for the new film.

title: The Dinosaurs
overview: From the first dinosaurs to the last, this epic documentary series examines their 165 million years on Earth and the forces that shaped their evolution.

title: The TikTok Killer
overview: When Esther vanishes without a trace, her family is able to piece together her last movements thanks to José Jurado Montilla, a traveler who journeys across Spain sharing heartfelt videos of his trips on his TikTok account. But “Dynamite” Montilla – the last person to have been with Esther – hides a dark past

title: A Friend, a Murderer
overview: A Danish town feared a serial criminal for eight years. When caught, Amanda, Nichlas and Kiri discovered the perpetrator was their close friend who'd committed assaults, kidnappings and murder while spending time with them.

title: Vladimir
overview: When an English professor becomes obsessed with a handsome new colleague, her already complicated marriage and career are thrown into total chaos.

title: DOC
overview: After an attack wipes 12 years of memories, a brilliant doctor must relearn his past, navigate tangled romances and a looming scandal over a new medication.

title: DTF St. Louis
overview: A love triangle among three adults experiencing middle-age malaise leads to one of them ending up dead.

title: BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai
overview: Baki and the strongest Underground Arena fighters face a threat of historical proportions: the resurrected Musashi Miyamoto, Japan's greatest samurai.

title: Crap Happens
overview: Rapper Toni returns to his hometown for his mother's funeral and suddenly finds himself juggling career dreams and surprise fatherhood to a teenage son.

title: Strip Law
overview: An uptight lawyer teams with a flashy Las Vegas magician to bring some pizzazz to the city's stupidest cases in this adult animated comedy.

title: Portobello
overview: In the early '80s, Enzo Tortora is one of the most beloved figures on Italian television. But in the midst of Italy's war against organized crime, Enzo's life is upended when he's falsely connected to the notorious Camorra criminal ring.

title: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
original_title: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
overview: What started as a glamorous launchpad for aspiring models became a pop-culture juggernaut defined by explosive drama, public meltdowns, and controversies that still fuel viral moments today.

title: Single's Inferno Reunion
overview: "Single's Inferno" contestants reunite to reveal honest feelings and relationship updates — revisiting standout moments from their time on the island.

title: Museum of Innocence
overview: In 1970s Istanbul, a man's forbidden love for a shop-girl evolves into a lifelong journey of obsession and longing.

title: The Art of Sarah
overview: A body found in the middle of town. A luxe label on the rise. A detective tests every stitch of a woman's story that keeps changing. What really happened?

title: Love Story
overview: An anthology of sweeping true love stories that captured the world’s attention.

title: Heart Code
original_title: สืบลับจับใจ
overview: After the attempted attack on a senior police officer, the Special Crime Suppression Unit launches a training camp to identify elite female officers. Among them is Captain Thara, a well-known officer who grows close to Vicky, unaware that Vicky is the daughter of the senior officer linked to her father’s death 19 years ago.

title: How to Get to Heaven from Belfast
original_title: How to Get to Heaven from Belfast
overview: Three lifelong pals embark on a chaotic quest to solve the mystery of their old friend's suspicious death and keep their own dark secret under wraps.

title: Million-Follower Detective
overview: In this crime thriller, Detective Chen Chia-jen races to unmask Baba the Witch, the viral tarot reader who accurately predicts the deaths of influencers.

title: Lead Children
overview: When a young doctor discovers that children living near a smelting plant suffer from lead poisoning, she risks her career and safety to save them.

title: Battle of Fates
overview: Is our fate predetermined? And can anyone truly read it? A groundbreaking competition dares to find out. Korea's top 49 top Fate Readers—masters of shamanism, saju, tarot, and face reading—put their pride on the line. Only those who can genuinely read fate will survive. Who will be the winner?

title: Motorvalley
overview: Desperate to gain control of her family's racing empire, an heiress hires a reckless driver and a troubled coach to compete in the Italian Gran Turismo.

title: Lord of the Flies
overview: After a plane crash, a group of schoolboys find themselves stranded on a tropical island without adults. Ralph is elected leader and, with the help of the intelligent Piggy, strives to maintain order and civilization. Jack, responsible for the signal fire, becomes increasingly focused on hunting and power struggles. This leads to tensions within the group, gradually pushing the boys from hope and structure into chaos and tragedy.

title: The 'Burbs
overview: Set in present-day suburbia, a young couple returns to the husband's childhood home. Their world is upended when new neighbors move in across the street, bringing old secrets of the cul-de-sac to light, and new deadly threats shatter the illusion of their quiet little neighborhood.

title: Salvador
overview: During a violent confrontation arranged between radical fans of two football clubs, Salvador Aguirre, an ambulance driver, rescues his injured daughter Milena, a member of the ultra group, which defends racist, violent and homophobic values, totally opposed to those he instilled in her.

title: Unfamiliar
overview: When the past catches up with two former spies, their biggest challenge isn't car chases, shootouts or fistfights — it's telling each other the truth.

title: Cash Queens
overview: When life pushes them to the brink, five desperate friends decide the only way out is to form a gang, swipe some guns and start holding up banks.

title: Bloody Flower
overview: A former medical school dropout claiming to be able to cure terminal illnesses is sentenced to death for the murder of 17 people. Is he a monstrous killer, or a savior holding the cure for humanity?

title: Madam Beja
overview: In imperial Brazil, a young woman stripped of her reputation is forced into exile from polite society. Recasting herself as Madam Beja, she builds an elite pleasure house that becomes a hub of political intrigue, economic power, and forbidden desire, using charm, intelligence, and ruthless strategy to bend the same men and institutions that once destroyed her.

title: Under Salt Marsh
overview: Morfa Halen is a tight-knit Welsh town precariously nestled between towering mountains and a fast-encroaching sea that threatens its very existence. As a once-in-a-generation storm begins to gather far out at sea, former detective turned teacher Jackie Ellis discovers the body of her 8-year-old pupil, Cefin, seemingly drowned. The discovery sends shockwaves through the community, reviving the ghost of an unsolved cold case that rocked the town three years prior - the disappearance of Jackie’s niece, Nessa, which cost her career.

title: Wonder Man
overview: Simon and Trevor, two actors at opposite ends of their careers, chase life-changing roles.

title: Free Bert
overview: A gloriously messy dad and his equally unfiltered family cause chaos when they try to fit in with the snobby crowd at their elite new school.

title: Finding Her Edge
overview: A former ice dancer returns to the rink with an exciting new partner while holding onto feelings for her old one — her first love.

title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
original_title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
overview: Directors Judd Apatow and Michael Bonfiglio explore the life and legacy of Mel Brooks, one of the most enduring comedic voices of our time.

title: The Beauty
overview: The world of high fashion turns dark when international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways. FBI Agents Cooper Madsen and Jordan Bennett are sent to Paris to uncover the truth. As they delve deeper into the case, they uncover a sexually transmitted virus that transforms ordinary people into visions of physical perfection, but with terrifying consequences.

title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
original_title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
overview: A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.

title: Can This Love Be Translated?
overview: The emotions of a celebrity and her interpreter get lost in translation as they travel the world filming a TV show. Will love find its own language?

title: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
overview: A young group of cadets come together to pursue a common dream of hope and optimism. Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they will discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

title: PONIES
overview: In 1977 Moscow, two "PONIES" ("persons of no interest") become CIA operatives and uncover a Cold War conspiracy their husbands were killed for.

title: Agatha Christie's Seven Dials
overview: England, 1925. At a lavish country house party, a practical joke appears to have gone horribly, murderously wrong. It will be up to the unlikeliest of sleuths—the fizzingly inquisitive Lady Eileen 'Bundle' Brent—to unravel a chilling plot that will change her life, cracking wide open the country house mystery.

title: To Love, To Lose
overview: A star-crossed romance seals the fate of two families when a woman trying to save her family restaurant falls for the surly heir of a debt collector.

title: Love Through a Prism
overview: In early 1900s London, a young Japanese woman enrolls in a famous art school, only to be surprised when rivalry with a gifted classmate becomes romance.

title: Taskaree: The Smuggler's Web
overview: A dedicated customs officer and his team take on a notorious smuggler leading a powerful syndicate, but unexpected obstacles threaten their mission.

title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
original_title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
overview: Inspired by his late mentor, Will Smith spends 100 days facing extreme challenges, venturing from pole to pole with scientists, explorers and experts.

title: Gomorrah: The Origins
overview: The series Gomorrah - The Origins explores Pietro Savastano's youth in the 1970s, in a Naples undergoing a transformation, poverty-stricken and plagued by cigarette smuggling. The story begins in 1977 with a very young Pietro, the son of no one, growing up as an adoptive brother in a family in the poorest part of Secondigliano. A street kid, he scrapes by as best he can, dreaming of a well-being that is still denied him. The story unfolds through Pietro's loss of innocence, along with his brothers and lifelong friends, their ambitions, and his first great love, which, like that of every teenager, will be wild and passionate. His encounter with Angelo, known as 'A Sirena,' the regent of Secondigliano, marks his entry into the world of crime. Through violence, alliances, and betrayals, Pietro discovers the price that life takes.

title: Paparazzi King
overview: Explore the life and career of paparazzi king Fabrizio Corona, reflecting Italy's recent history of scandals and social change.

title: Girl Taken
overview: Follow the story of twin sisters Lily and Abby, whose lives are shattered when Lily is abducted from their quiet rural English town by beloved local teacher Rick Hansen. After years of abuse in captivity, Lily escapes - only to discover that freedom brings its own challenges.

title: HIS & HERS
overview: Two estranged spouses — one a detective, the other a news reporter — vie to solve a murder in which each believes the other is a prime suspect.

title: Defying Destiny
overview: This is the story of María, a leader whose face will become the icon of the social class struggle to grant legal status to domestic workers who, for years, worked without labor rights in her country.

title: Land of Sin
overview: When a teenager goes missing, a detective with personal ties to the case joins a tense investigation that reveals fierce loyalties and old family feuds.

title: Run Away
overview: A desperate father searching for his runaway daughter gets caught up in a murder case — and stumbles upon secrets which could destroy his family for good.

title: Time Flies
overview: Fresh out of prison and low on options, two women run a fumigation business — until a shady client pulls them back into the life they fought to escape.

title: Love from 9 to 5
overview: Two colleagues from vastly different backgrounds initially despise each other. He is a privileged "nepo baby," while she is a determined worker who has earned everything through her efforts. Their competitive spirit leads to unexpected sparks and, eventually, deeper affection.
